page_metadata.biotools__summary: Combining bootstrap aggregating and Gene Set Enrichment Analysis, this software is a classfication algorithm with high robustness and no over-fitting problem. It performs especially well for the data generated from different exprements.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Combining bootstrap aggregating and Gene Set Enrichment Analysis, this software is a classfication algorithm with high robustness and no over-fitting problem. It performs especially well for the data generated from different exprements.
